title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Navneet Education Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Navneet Education Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Navneet Education Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Navneet Education Ventures Solutions:
Navneet Education Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
